message: At this time, Guy and the others must have already set off.
They told me this morning they would be heading out in the evening, so it was sudden.
I didn’t even get to ask where they were going.
Without Guy, it’s so quiet here.
B-boss, it’s a major crisis! A major crisis!
What’s going on? You’re so loud just coming back.
Isn’t everyone involved in the incidents happening in New York someone we know?
That’s true. Ever since being invited to the Fabar director’s party in Boston, things have been going downhill.
Guy and the others seem suspicious too.
Hello, I let myself in since the door wasn't locked.
What can I do for you today? Is it about the case of Ginny being found?
Oh, you already knew that. As expected from a detective.
Come on, I was the one who told you. If you're going to compliment someone, make sure it's me.
Hey there, you’ve managed to stay safe so far. Or are you perhaps the killer's girlfriend?
That's rude; I don't deserve to be called a killer.
Well, that’s a valid point. You haven't been confirmed as the killer yet.
Mr. Snipes, I apologize, but could you accompany us to the station?
Listen, kid, this guy is actually the fearsome serial murder case suspect. You've been lucky to have made it this far.
Wait a second, I didn't do anything like that.
I’m sorry, but I don’t want to resort to rough methods. Please cooperate and we can speak comfortably at the station.
Hey, don’t you think it’d be better to just knock him out? Nobody's going to complain about hitting a scumbag like this.
They will, and I'll be the one saying it, trust me!
Be quiet. Fine, there’s nothing I need to hide. If we talk, you’ll understand.
Outside, it was almost time to be enveloped by dusk.
Hehe, being too honest is a bit scary, don’t you think, old man?
I'm sorry it has turned out this way. However, if you can prove your innocence at the station, you can go home right away.
This is my first time in a police station. If I think of it as a field trip, it feels a lot more relaxed.
What do you mean relaxed, you idiot! I'm the kind of persistent snake of a man. I'll uncover all your crimes.
Come on, get in the car quickly!
the smell of the buns bought earlier is wafting.
Despite having run here out of breath, the usual arrogant pose hasn't changed.
how far did they go to buy those buns?
You’re so relaxed at a time like this!
Even if you say it’s a big deal or something serious, you can’t expect me to be shocked without knowing what's so serious, right?
Oh, right. I thought we had already talked about it. Ah, how embarrassing!
The world feels so chaotic right now.
they found Ginny's corpse in the East River!
They say she was missing an arm.
It was a corpse with no left arm.
So she really was dead, huh?
When Guy and the others went on their trip, Ginny's corpse was discovered.
Oh, no way! Could it be that Guy and the others are the culprits and fled the country like this?
Ginny was killed quite a while ago, the police officer who was at the scene said.
Where did Guy and the others go on their trip?
I don't mean to say this,
I mean, it’s been all people linked to Guy or Kristy that have been killed.
Kristy must have been resenting the women involved with Guy, right?
But then again, there's no evidence that she definitely did it.
Still, when you think about it, it's a bit weird that only people connected to Kristy and Guy are being killed.
Could it be that Kristy is...
